channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Farage exploiting Henry Nowak’s murder against wishes of his family, says Starmer – UK politics live
item.description: Farage exploiting Henry Nowak’s murder against wishes of his family, says Starmer – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Henry Nowak latest: Starmer hits out at Farage’s ‘unforgivable’ response to murder - ‘It shows exactly who he is’
item.description: Henry Nowak latest: Starmer hits out at Farage’s ‘unforgivable’ response to murder - ‘It shows exactly who he is’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: The real reason Farage has seized on the murder of Henry Nowak
item.description: The real reason Farage has seized on the murder of Henry Nowak

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Swinney ‘has no plans’ to meet Trump during US visit for World Cup
item.description: Swinney ‘has no plans’ to meet Trump during US visit for World Cup

item.title: i Politics: 'I hate Labour, but I'll vote Burnham': how Reform could be derailed by tactical voting
item.description: 'I hate Labour, but I'll vote Burnham': how Reform could be derailed by tactical voting

item.title: BBC Politics: Scottish Secretary did not declare meeting with Mandelson's firm
item.description: Scottish Secretary did not declare meeting with Mandelson's firm

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Minister admits police anti-racism guidance is ‘wrong’
item.description: Minister admits police anti-racism guidance is ‘wrong’

item.title: The Times: Keir Starmer: Nigel Farage is exploiting Henry Nowak’s murder - The Times
